assets/5.webp: What are you saying, you lunatic?
assets/6.webp: Enough. I do not like this anymore.
assets/7.webp: Your incompetence is giving me wrinkles.
assets/12.webp: My heart hurts. The blanket is wet with tears.
assets/13.webp: Breathe through the nose. Keep faith in the chest.
assets/14.webp: Two options. Pick one and leave.
assets/15.webp: A complete disaster, now standing on its own head.
assets/16.webp: Who ends a speech like that?
assets/17.webp: For the poor, laughter and crying are basically the same.
assets/18.webp: How could you do this without thinking once?
assets/21.webp: I am watching. I am saying nothing. Still watching.
assets/22.webp: A dog attempts an unnecessary tongue twister.
assets/23.webp: That was a warning. Next time, straight red card.
assets/25.webp: One hit here. The body lands at the crematorium.
assets/26.webp: Fine, brother. I will remember this.
assets/27.webp: What is up, boss? All good?
assets/29.webp: Take the chance the moment it appears.
assets/33.webp: Brother, did that make you angry?
assets/34.webp: The trap has acquired a customer.
assets/35.webp: No, uncle. None of that is true.
assets/36.webp: Do you not have any work to do?
assets/37.webp: What happened? Suddenly unable to speak?
assets/38.webp: Age is increasing. I am not who I used to be.
assets/39.webp: The man has caught a fever.
assets/41.webp: This is crossing every known limit of indecency.
assets/42.webp: Oh, come on. It is Sunday.
assets/44.webp: How exactly do I say this?
assets/45.webp: Observe the advanced level of flattery.
assets/46.webp: I am perfectly fine like this.
assets/48.webp: Look. The fool fell into his own trap.
assets/50.webp: Well. It is exactly what I thought.
assets/51.webp: This will hurt today. One day you will understand.
assets/52.webp: Yes. The boy occasionally uses his brain.
assets/56.webp: I will slap you properly. Understood?
assets/57.webp: Kids these days. Stickers all day.
assets/58.webp: Staying quiet is an art. Consider learning it.
assets/60.webp: Good grief. This phone call is a lot.
assets/62.webp: What a kick. Full marks for impact.
assets/63.webp: Mischief from waking up until bedtime.
assets/65.webp: Too much affection has turned them into a monkey.
assets/66.webp: Pretending to be too innocent to flip a fried fish.
assets/69.webp: The police called? I did nothing.
assets/70.webp: Bad news. They figured out the plan.
assets/72.webp: I will not tolerate this disrespect.
assets/73.webp: Go to sleep. Enough nonsense for today.
assets/74.webp: You got older. You did not mature.
assets/76.webp: Do not turn around. He will recognize us.
assets/77.webp: It is one o'clock. Put the phone down and sleep.
assets/78.webp: The tail is curled in the brain too. Incorrigible.
assets/79.webp: I cannot find a sticker strong enough for this reply.
assets/80.webp: Long legs. Ideal for suddenly tripping you.
assets/81.webp: You got it exactly right, lunatic.
assets/82.webp: Look in the mirror. Then ask again.
assets/83.webp: Someone has grown wings and is getting bolder daily.
assets/84.webp: You dumped it on me and ran. Uno reverse.
assets/85.webp: You told Mom? You told Dad too?
assets/86.webp: Once time leaves, crying will not bring it back.
assets/87.webp: This is the time to build yourself.
assets/88.webp: A polite summary of a much longer internal insult.
assets/89.webp: Mercy is over. Only hard life remains.
assets/90.webp: Knows nothing. Does not know that either.
assets/91.webp: A 1.5 kg hilsa has arrived. This is major news.
assets/92.webp: Typing that message insulted your own thumb.
assets/94.webp: Just thinking about it gives me chills.
assets/95.webp: Do not say that. It hurts deeply.
assets/96.webp: Not angry at all. That tiny smile proves it.
assets/98.webp: Hair like instant noodles. Threat level: bomb.
assets/99.webp: Please continue. I am only watching.
assets/100.webp: I heard some things about you. True?
assets/105.webp: Listen to what the children are saying.
